name: Soupe Aux Pois Beauceons (Pea Soup, Beauce St
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Smoked ham, plus ham bone
2 tablespoons Salted herbs, rinsed in cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak peas for at least 8 hours or overnight in enough water to cover; drain.
2. Heat butter in a large, heavy pot and sauté onion and leek until tender.
3. Add peas, ham (in one piece), salt pork, garlic, and salted herbs to the pot.
4. Pour in cold water and bring the mixture quickly to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and partially cover the pot. Cook gently for 2 to 3 hours or until the peas are tender.
6. Stir occasionally during cooking, adding more water if necessary.
7. Remove the salt pork, cut into small pieces, and return it to the soup.
8. The soup may be frozen for later use.
Servings: 8
